{{Infobox character
| name = Doctor Elios
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Elios]] is a white-haired human man with a stooped back.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13">''The Pilot'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Elios]] advised against rushing into the treatment.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Elios]] is an old human man.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17">''The Pilot'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
